    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    ActivityLogController
    Activity log lines from the server log file with admin versus employee filtering.
    Address
    Mutable address value for forms and REST payloads.
    AddressInputHelper
    Editable ComboBox helper with type to filter over a master address list.
    AddressOption
    Address row for searchable ComboBox pickers with formatted labels in the editor.
    ApiClient
    Singleton HTTP client for the Workshop 7 Spring Boot API (springdoc OpenAPI on the server).
    AuthResponseDto
    Maps fields returned after successful login.
    Bakery
    Bakery branch with nested address for location CRUD screens.
    BakeryApi
    Admin bakery create update and delete.
    BakeryLocationsController
    Staff CRUD for bakery branches and addresses and operating hours with optional image upload.
    BakeryOption
    Bakery id and display name for ComboBox value types.
    CatalogApi
    Wrappers for catalog and specials endpoints.
    CatalogApi.AddressResponse
     
    CatalogApi.BakeryHourJson
    JSON for bakery hours rows.
    CatalogApi.BakeryResponse
     
    CatalogApi.ProductResponse
    JSON for GET /api/v1/products.
    CatalogApi.ProductSpecialResponse
    JSON for GET /api/v1/product-specials/all.
    CatalogApi.TagResponse
     
    ChatApi
    Static helpers for chat threads and messages.
    ChatApi.MessageJson
     
    ChatApi.StaffJson
     
    ChatApi.ThreadJson
     
    ChatController
    Staff customer chat inbox with category filters polling and compose actions toward the web app.
    ConversationSummary
    One inbox row for the legacy messaging UI with partner id and last activity and unread count.
    Customer
    JavaFX customer row used by profile and customer admin screens.
    CustomerApi
    Admin customer operations under /api/v1/admin/customers.
    CustomerApi.CustomerRow
     
    CustomerManagementController
    Staff customer directory with profile edits and order history and reward tier assignment.
    CustomerOption
    Customer selector row used by order and reference pickers.
    DashboardApi
    Dashboard summary from GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard/summary.
    DashboardApi.SummaryResponse
     
    DashboardController
    Dashboard summary cards and recent orders backed by the dashboard and order APIs.
    DBUtil
    Loads DB_URL DB_USER and DB_PASSWORD from .env.local in the process working directory and opens JDBC connections.
    DialogHelper
    Configures dialogs to be resizable and responsive to screen size.
    Employee
    Employee profile with JavaFX properties for table views and search filters and edit dialogs.
    EmployeeApi
    Staff list from /api/v1/employee/staff and admin writes under /api/v1/admin/employees.
    EmployeeApi.EmployeeRow
     
    EmployeeManagementController
    Staff employee directory create and edit with bakery and address linking.
    ErrorHandler
    Shared JavaFX alerts and short user-safe messages for HTTP SQL and validation failures.
    FormValidator
    Collects rules per control and shows inline error labels on blur or after the first submit.
    FormValidator.ChoiceBuilder<T>
     
    FormValidator.FieldBuilder
     
    ImageUploadApi
    Uploads images through admin routes.
    Log
     
    LogData
    File-backed audit lines plus Sentry forwarding for staff action and error paths.
    LoginController
    Staff login obtains JWT session state then loads the main shell scene.
    LoginRequestDto
    Request body for Workshop 7 login at POST /api/v1/auth/login.
    MainApplication
    JavaFX entry point.
    MainController
    Root window with sidebar navigation lazy-loaded panes and avatar display hooks.
    Message
    JavaFX staff message row mapped from API UUID based payloads.
    MessageApi
    Staff messaging via /api/v1/messages.
    MessageApi.LegacyMessageJson
     
    MessagingController
    Staff messaging inbox and thread view backed by the messages API.
    Order
    JavaFX order row used by order list and checkout admin screens.
    OrderApi
    Orders list detail items status updates and staff checkout.
    OrderApi.ItemJson
     
    OrderApi.OrderJson
     
    OrderItem
    JavaFX order line item row for checkout and detail screens.
    OrderManagementController
    Order list filtering status updates and staff checkout with manual discount aligned to server rules.
    OrderOption
    Order pick list entry.
    OrderStatus
    Shared status constants keep desktop labels aligned with API values.
    Payment
    JavaFX payment row used in order payment summaries.
    PhoneFieldFormatter
    Attaches a TextFormatter that accepts digits and formats Canadian ten digit numbers as (123)-456-7890.
    Product
    JavaFX product row used by catalog and specials screens.
    ProductManagementController
    Staff product catalog CRUD with optional image upload to blob storage.
    ProductSpecial
    Featured discount row for catalog specials.
    ProductSpecialsController
    Product specials CRUD for featured discounts and dates.
    Province
    Canadian province or territory code with full name for address ComboBox rows.
    ReferenceApi
    Loads reference data for admin screens (customers, bakeries, addresses, catalog).
    ReferenceApi.AddressJson
     
    ReferenceApi.CustomerJson
     
    ReferenceApi.UserSummaryJson
     
    Review
    JavaFX review row for moderation and reporting views.
    Reward
    Loyalty ledger row for points earned on an order with display strings for tables.
    RewardApi
    Reads /api/v1/rewards and joins optional order rows for readable columns in the UI.
    RewardApi.RewardJson
     
    RewardController
    Read-only loyalty ledger for staff with search and privacy masking on customer fields.
    RewardTier
    Loyalty tier with point bounds and discount rate for staff CRUD.
    RewardTierApi
    Admin CRUD for reward tier rows at /api/v1/reward-tiers.
    RewardTierApi.RewardTierJson
     
    RewardTierController
    Reward tier band CRUD for loyalty point ranges and discount rates.
    RewardTierOption
    Pick list row mapping tier id to label for reward tier ComboBox UIs.
    StageIconHelper
    Window title bar and taskbar icon on most platforms.
    StageSizing
    Stage dimensions for the login shell (StageSizing.applyLoginShellBounds(Stage)) and the post-login main shell (StageSizing.applyMainShellBounds(Stage)).
    StringUtil
    Shared string utility methods used across controllers.
    UiPrivacy
    Hides UUID-shaped identifiers from user-visible strings where policy is to avoid exposing raw ids.
    User
    Login user stub with JavaFX properties for session and compatibility with legacy integer user ids.
    UserInitialsHelper
    Builds two letter style initials for avatars for example JD for John Doe or NM for Noah Martin.
    UserManagementApi
    Desktop client for /api/v1/admin/users list create and PATCH active flag.
    UserManagementApi.UserRow
     
    UserManagementController
    Admin-only user accounts list with create and active toggle workflows.
    UserManagementController.UserRow
     
    UserOption
    Login account pick list row keyed by API user id with username as the visible label.
    UserSession
    In-memory session for the signed-in staff user JWT and profile hints.
    ValidationResult
    Reusable validation result for form validation across controllers.
    Validator
